titleStmt.title: SII 34.141: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 141. Tiruveṟumbūr, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the south wall of the first prākāra of the Piplikēśvara temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Māṟavarman Sundarapāṇḍya II, 8th year, 1009th day (also 8+1+1) = A.D. 1248.

This relates to the royal gift of the village of Erumaikkuḷam in Teṉ-Kaḷavaḻi-nāḍu for a festival in the name of the Prince (piḷḷaiyār) Bagavadi-Āḻvār in the temple of Tiruveṟumbiyūr-uḍaiyār. On the advice of Ayyaṉ Maḻavarāyaṉ the king gave away the village as dēvadāna-iṟaiyili inclusive of the kārāṇmai and mīyāṭchi rights and with all the tax revenue. The previous leascholds and jīvitam tenures in the village were exempted from the purview of the gift.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmalaṟ tiruvum poruceya maṭantaiyum tāmaraikkuvimulai ceyaṉattiruppa vEta nāvil veḷ Itaḷ tāmarai kātalmātu kaviṉpeṟa tiḷaippa veṇṭirai Uṭutta maṇṭiḷa kiṭakkai tirunilamaṭantai Urimaiyil kaḷippa
camayamum nītiyum tarumamum taḻaittu Imaiyavar viḷākkoṭi Iṭantoṟum Eṭuppa karuṅkali kaṉalkeṭak kaṭavuḷ vētiyar Aruntoḻil ceṅkōl vaḷarppa curutiyum tamiḻum tol viḷamu kulava poru niṟal Āḻi pūtalam cūḻa Orukai Iru cevi
mummata nāṟkōṭṭu Ayirāvata mutal cētira koṟṟat tiṇṭirai Āṉai Erutan mēṟ kaṇṭa nāṭum maruḷak kayal kaḷikūṭa kōcalam tuḷuvam poppaḷam puṇṭaram kaliṅkam Iḻam koṅkam kavuṭam teliṅkam cīṉamutalāya vitimuṟai tikaḻa
vevvēṟu vakutta mutunilak kiḻamaiyil muṭipuṉai vēntaṟkku Oru taṉi nāyakat tirumuṭi cūṭi ceṅkōl Ōcci koṟṟat taṇkuḷir kuṭai niḻal kaṟppaka kavari kāvalar vīca viṭukatir navamaṇi vīrasiṅhātaṉattu Uṭaṉ muṭicūṭi Uyarkula
ttiruvaḷa matumalaṟ karaṅkuvintu pāttivar maṅkayar tiraṇṭu vaṇaṅkum ceṉṉiyil cuṭaroḷi mavuliyil cuṭaroḷi mēl Iṭaccivanta yiṇai malar cīṟaṭi kamalattu Ulaka muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya māmutal matikkula viḷakkiya kō
mutal kōmāṟu panmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ cuntarapāṇṭiya tēvaṟ(k) ku yāṇṭu Eṭṭu nāḷ Āyirattoṉpatiṉāl maturōtaiya vaḷanāṭṭu māṭakkuḷakkīḻ maturaikkōyil paḷḷi Aṟaikūṭattup pīṭam maḻavarāyaṉil Eḻuntaruḷi
Iruntu Uṭaiyār tiruveṟumpiyūr Uṭaiyār kōyililt tānattārukkum tēvakaṉmiyum ceyyat tiruvāymoḻintaruḷinapaṭi Uṭaiyār tiruveṟumpiyūr Uṭaiyārukkup piḷḷaikaḷil pakavati Āḻvār pērāl kaṇṭa cantikku tiruppaṭi
māṟṟu Uḷḷiṭṭu vēṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷum teṉ kaḷavaḻināṭṭu Erumaikkuḷam nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa Iṭam nīr nilamum karuñcey puṉceyum nattamum kuḷamum Uṭpaṭṭa nilattup paḻaṉ tēvatānam paḷḷiccantam nīkki Uḷḷa nilamum muṉṉuṭaiyāru
m Uḻavum cīvitamum mutalu tavittu kārāṇmai mīyāṭciyum kaṭamaiyum Antarāyamu viṉiyōkamum taruvatāṉa Accum kāriya Ārāṭciyum pāṭi kāvalum poṉvariyum maṟṟum Eppēṟpaṭṭiṉavum Uṭpaṭa Eṭṭāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu
mutal tēvatāṉa Iṟaiyili Āka Iṭapeṟavēṇumeṉṟu Ayyaṉ maḻavarāyar namakku coṉṉamaiyil Ittēvarukkup piḷḷaikaḷil pakavati Āḻvār pērāl kaṇṭa cantikkut tiruppaṭimāṟṟu Uḷḷiṭṭu vēṇṭum nimantaṅ
kaḷukku teṉkaḷavaḻi nāṭṭu Erumaikkuḷam nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nīrnilamum karuñcey puṉceyyum Ēttamum tōṭṭamum kuḷamum Uṭpaṭṭa nilattil paḻantēvatāṉam paḷḷiccantam nīkki nīkki Uḷḷa nilamum muṉṉuṭaiyārum Uḻavum
cīvitamum mutalum tavirntu kārāṇmai mīyāṭciyum kaṭamaiyum Antarāyamum viṉiyōkamum taruvatāṉa Accum kāriya Ārāṭciyum pāṭikāvalum poṉvariyum maṟṟum Eppērppaṭṭiṉavum Uṭpaṭa Ivvāṇṭu mutal tēvatāṉa I
ṟaiyili Āka variilār Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvariyum nam Ōlaiyum taraccoṉṉōm Ippaṭi cantirātittavaṟ celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭivittuk koḷka Eṉṟu tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉār Ivai tirumalli nāṭṭut taṭaṅkaṇṇic ciṟṟū
ruṭaiyāṉum niṉṟāṭuvāṉ vīracōḻa tēvaṉāṉa kurukulattaraiyaṉeḻuttu Ivai cevvirukkai nāṭṭuc cakkarapāṇi nallūr Araiyaṉ viratamuṭittāṉāṉa pallavarāyaṉeḻuttuḥ—
Digital edition of SII 34.141 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
